MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON JUL-17-2024 IN DEPT. 206 -- SPECIAL APPEARANCE BY KENNETH TSANG, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF ALEXANDER BURKHARDT -- PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL IS TENTATIVELY GRANTED. THE COURT CONTINUED THIS MOTION FROM JUL-17-2024 TO JUL-24-2024, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206 FOR PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT TO MEET AND CONFER AND AGREE ON A SPECIFIC JANUARY 2025 TRIAL DATE. MOVING PARTY TO E-FILE STIPULATION INDICATING AGREED UPON TRIAL DATE. ADDITIONALLY, MOVING PARTY TO EMAIL SAID FILED STIPULATION WITH A PROPOSED ORDER TO DEPARTMENT206@SFTC.ORG. IF STIPULATION IS FILED AND ORDER SIGNED BY THE COURT, PARTIES NEED NOT APPEAR AT THE 7/24/24 CONTINUED MOTION HEARING. IF PARTIES CANNOT AGREE ON A NEW TRIAL DATE, THEY ARE EXPECTED TO APPEAR IN PERSON AT THE 7/24/24 HEARING. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 74725101)
